description: Update your style quotient with ease by adding this stylish, brown and black bag from lino perros to your accessory collection. Roomy and comfortable to carry, the smooth silhouette of this bag blends well with any outfit. Height: 35 cm Width: 42 cm Depth: 12 cm Made of synthetic leather and a blended fabric for durability Has one main roomy, zipped compartment with one inner zipped compartment and an organiser pouch for essentials One short broad handle woven through metallic loops and a long, removable and adjustable strap for carrying ease and style A zipped pocket at the back Small metallic stud design on the front with two zipped pockets on the sides for style Stitch detailing, branded zips and brand badge appliqué d on the front Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
